acceptedAnswer.text: Utah avg $340k, median $200k for neck/back; varies by severity.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah neck/back settlements average $340k, median $200k, depending on severity, lost wages, permanency.[6] Factors like surgery or fusion increase value.[2] Key factors: (1) Medical costs, future care; (2) Lost income, impairment rating; (3) Pre-existing issues reduce amount.
